title: Production Support Plan Skill
summary: Pre-investigation planning: calls list_log_descriptions() to discover available logs and their summaries, optionally searches internal docs via repoask_doc_check, selects relevant services, interprets the time window, and presents a human-reviewable scan plan. The user approves the plan to trigger production-support-main.
author: Platform Engineering

scripts.note: Call list_log_descriptions(env) to discover available logs. No main.py needed for planning.

referencedQueries: which logs to scan for issue
what urls to trace for incident
knowledgeGraph:
graph TD
  A[User Incident Query] --> B[Step 1: List Logs + Optional Doc Search]
  B --> C[Select Services + Time Window]
  C --> D{User Approves?}
  D -->|edit| C
  D -->|yes| E[production-support-main]
